outreachAngle: We wrote up your approved scheme at Beeleigh  Main Road Rettendon Chelmsford Essex CM3 8DP and modelled high-level senior debt at 70% LTGDV (£560k against estimated GDV £800k).
emailSubject: Indicative 70% LTGDV funding view for Beeleigh  Main Road Rettendon Chelmsford Essex CM3 8DP
emailBody:
Hi Mr Christos Alexandrou,

I saw that Chelmsford City Council approved 26/00560/FUL for Beeleigh  Main Road Rettendon Chelmsford Essex CM3 8DP. We have written a short market note on the site here: https://constructioncapital.co.uk/news/2026-07-01-26-00560-ful-chelmsford-planning-approved

Using local sold-price data, we estimate GDV at £800k. At 70% LTGDV, that points to high-level senior debt of around £560k, subject to valuation, cost plan, borrower experience and lender underwriting.

If this is a live scheme, I can put proper indicative terms together from our lender panel within 24 hours.

Regards,
Matt Lenzie
Construction Capital
letterBody:
Mr Christos Alexandrou


Re: Beeleigh  Main Road Rettendon Chelmsford Essex CM3 8DP - approved planning application 26/00560/FUL

We noticed the recent approval for the above site and have prepared a short market note covering the planning consent, local sold-price evidence and a high-level senior debt view:
https://constructioncapital.co.uk/news/2026-07-01-26-00560-ful-chelmsford-planning-approved

Based on the available data, we estimate GDV at £800k. At 70% LTGDV, this indicates potential senior debt of around £560k, subject to valuation, cost plan, borrower experience and lender underwriting.

Construction Capital arranges senior debt, mezzanine finance and equity/JV funding for UK property developers. If this site is moving toward acquisition or construction, we can provide formal indicative terms from our lender panel within 24 hours.

Yours faithfully,
Matt Lenzie
Construction Capital
